changelog:
v1.4.0 (2026-03-15)

  • New: Preflight now checks category/tag base settings (expects blog/category and blog/tag)
  • New: Preflight checks Rank Math noindex settings for category, tag, author, and date archives
  • New: Preflight detects slug collisions between categories and pages (prevents service page conflicts)

v1.3.1

  • Remove LiteSpeed from required plugins

v1.3.0

  • Post Dates, Bulk Dates, Post Audit, Sideload Media, Preflight, Auto-updater
